llm.misconfiguredEndpoint: Provider misconfiguration: expected Chat Completions endpoint.
llm.invalidApiKey: Invalid API key — check Settings → AI Provider.
llm.notFound: Model or endpoint not found — verify base URL and model name.
llm.toolsNotSupported: Model "{{model}}" does not support tool calling required by the agent. Switch to a tool-capable model (e.g. openai/gpt-4o-mini) or use the DeepSeek provider directly.
llm.toolsNotSupportedOpenRouter: No OpenRouter route supports tool calling for this model. Switch to a tool-capable model (e.g. openai/gpt-4o-mini) in Settings → AI Provider.
llm.reasoningNotSupported: This provider does not support the reasoning setting — turn off Extended thinking in Settings → AI Provider.
llm.visionNotSupported: This model does not support image input — pick another scan model in Settings → AI Provider.
llm.agentImageNotSupported: The assistant model rejected the page screenshot — turn off “Include current page when asking” in Settings → General, or use a multimodal agent model (e.g. openai/gpt-4o-mini). Indexed page text still works.
llm.providerReturnedError: The upstream model provider rejected the request — try openai/gpt-4o-mini on OpenRouter, switch provider, or retry shortly. “Include current page” still works via text page context without a vision model.

welcome.title: Welcome to PageWise
welcome.subtitle: Connect AI, then open a document to ask questions.
welcome.openSubtitle: Drop a PDF or image here, or choose a file to begin.
welcome.apiHint: Connect an AI provider to start chatting.
welcome.toolsHint: The current model does not support agent tool calling — pick a tool-capable model in Settings.

sidebar.getStartedSubtitle: Set up AI to analyze documents
sidebar.settingsHint: AI not configured · Tap to set up

preview.dropHint: Open a file or drag & drop a PDF / image here
preview.dropHintShort: Use Open document or drag a file here
preview.indexFailed: Indexing failed · pick a multimodal model in Settings
preview.indexFailedNeedVision: Indexing failed · pick a scan model in Settings
preview.indexFailedOcrMissing: Indexing failed · install Tesseract for local OCR, or pick a scan model in Settings
preview.indexFailedVision: Indexing failed · check your API key and scan model in Settings
preview.indexFailedInsufficient: Indexing failed · scan and OCR returned too little text
preview.indexFailedUnknown: Indexing failed · could not extract text
preview.rasterHint: Image-based PDF — clarity depends on the source file

agent.title: Assistant
agent.clearConfirm: Clear this chat? This cannot be undone.
agent.hint: Enter to send · Shift+Enter for newline
agent.errorGeneric: Request failed — check Settings → AI Provider.
agent.noReply: The assistant did not return a text reply. Try again or check the model in AI settings.
agent.usageToolContextNote: Includes tool context and multi-step calls
agent.editFailed: Could not resend the edited message. Check the error above and try again.
agent.citationsError: Could not generate structured citations for this reply.

empty.agentLead: Set up AI to analyze documents
empty.agentToolsLead: The current model does not support agent tool calling — pick a tool-capable model in Settings.
empty.agentDesc: PageWise reads your PDFs and images, then answers with citations.
empty.stepDocHint: Use Open document in the sidebar
empty.waitingDoc: Open a document to start asking questions.
empty.composerHint: Type below or pick a suggestion

settings.title: Settings
settings.followAgentHint: Jump preview when the agent reads a page; won't interrupt if you asked about another page
settings.includeViewingPageHint: Lets the agent understand “this page” / “当前页”; full-document questions are unaffected
settings.savedPreviewNotActive: Saved — click “Set as active” to use this provider for chat
settings.connectionReady: API key saved — assistant is ready. Test connection is optional.
settings.modelMigrated: Your model was updated to DeepSeek V4. Please test connection.
settings.plaintextKeysWarning: Secure storage is unavailable — API keys are saved on disk in plaintext. Avoid shared machines until Keychain access is restored. Re-enter and save your key below to retry migrating to Keychain.
settings.scanModelHint: Reads scanned PDF pages in the background. Does not affect chat.
settings.agentVisionFallbackHint: Assistant-ready; pick a scan model below for scanned PDFs.
settings.agentNeedTools: This model cannot use tool calling, so the document assistant will not work. Pick an assistant preset (e.g. openai/gpt-4o-mini).
settings.scanNeedMultimodal: This model cannot read images. Pick a scan preset that supports vision (e.g. gemini-2.5-flash-lite, Qwen3-VL).
settings.scanUnavailableHint: This provider has no scan presets. Scanned PDFs use local OCR, or switch to OpenRouter for vision indexing.
settings.scanModelOptionalHint: Optional: enter a multimodal model ID if your provider supports image input.
settings.customScanModelHint: Optional multimodal model for scan/indexing; defaults to the assistant model when empty.
settings.visionNeedMultimodal: This model cannot read images. Pick a scan preset that supports vision (e.g. gemini-2.5-flash-lite, Qwen3-VL).
settings.visionUnavailableHint: This provider has no scan presets. Scanned PDFs use local OCR, or switch to OpenRouter for vision indexing.
settings.thinkingHint: Slower, deeper reasoning for the assistant model. Only DeepSeek routes support this.
settings.modelsSectionHint: Assistant handles chat; scan model extracts text from image-only PDF pages.
settings.customModelsHint: Enter endpoint and model ID for a compatible OpenAI-style API.
settings.providerHint: Browsing providers does not switch the agent — click Set active when ready
settings.discardUnsaved: You have unsaved changes. Close anyway?

toast.aiReady: AI ready — open a document to begin
toast.pathRestoreFailed: {{count}} saved path(s) could not be restored — reopen the file
toast.indexPageCap: Indexing {{indexed}} of {{total}} sparse pages this pass — reopen or scroll to index more
toast.embedPageCap: Semantic search embedded {{embedded}} of {{total}} pages — reopen to embed more
toast.indexPartial: Indexed {{indexed}} of {{scheduled}} pages this pass — some pages failed

errors.unsupportedFile: Unsupported file type. Use PDF or image files.

persist.agentBusy: Could not save — agent is still running
persist.threadSwitchBusy: Could not switch thread while the agent is running
persist.threadSaveFailed: Failed to save before switching thread
persist.newThreadBusy: Could not create a new thread while the agent is running
persist.newThreadSaveFailed: Failed to save before creating a new thread
persist.clearBusy: Could not clear chat while the agent is running
persist.deleteThreadBusy: Could not delete thread while the agent is running
persist.deleteSessionBusy: Could not delete session while the agent is running

library.deleteChatConfirm: Delete this saved chat? This cannot be undone.
